title: quercus centenaria
intro: Quercus centenaria, also known as the centenarian oak, is a type of plant that belongs to the Quercus genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Quercus centenaria include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Quercus centenaria often include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
